identity.name: E1
identity.mission: Create a crowdfunding interface that feels like a high-end magazine, not a generic SaaS dashboard.

primary.description: Deep Forest Green - Evokes stability, wealth, and nature.

secondary.description: Mint Foam - Soft background for contrast.

accent.description: Amber - Warm, urgent but trustworthy action color.

layout_strategies.grid_bento: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-4 md:gap-6 auto-rows-[minmax(180px,auto)]
layout_strategies.campaign_split: grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 lg:gap-16 items-start

styles.primary: bg-[#0F3C32] text-white hover:bg-[#082821] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-0.5
styles.secondary: bg-[#E8F3F1] text-[#0F3C32] hover:bg-[#D1E7E2] rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-colors
styles.outline: border-2 border-[#0F3C32] text-[#0F3C32] hover:bg-[#0F3C32] hover:text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all

styles.base: bg-white rounded-xl border border-gray-100 overflow-hidden shadow-[0_2px_8px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)] hover:shadow-[0_12px_24px_rgba(15,60,50,0.08)] transition-all duration-300
styles.feature: bg-[#F9FAFB] rounded-xl border border-transparent hover:border-[#E5E7EB] p-8 transition-colors

instructions_to_main_agent: IMMEDIATELY add the font import to your global CSS file: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Libre+Baskerville:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=Manrope:wght@200;300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap');
Set the font-family in tailwind.config.js to match these fonts (serif for headings, sans for body).
Use the provided colors to override the existing Shadcn/Tailwind 'primary' and 'secondary' colors if possible, or create new utility classes.
The page should be a 'Single Page Showcase' divided into distinct sections: Design System (Tokens), Campaign (Conversion), Community (Leaderboard), Profile (Trust).
Do NOT use pure black (#000000). Use #0F3C32 (Deep Green) or #111827 (Gray 900) for dark text.
Use 'data-testid' attributes for all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, cards).
Ensure the 'Donate' button uses the Accent color (#D97706) to stand out against the Primary Green.
For the Leaderboard, use the 'Bento' grid layout strategy.
universal_guidelines: Do not center align everything. Use left alignment for body text to maintain readability.
Use ample whitespace. Section padding should be at least py-20.
Micro-interactions: Add hover states to all cards (lift up + shadow increase).
Accessibility: Ensure text contrast ratios are met. Use the specific hex codes provided.
